stemHtml:
Which statement, about the effects on drag of removing external tip tanks from the wings of an aeroplane, is correct?

I. Parasite drag decreases.
II. Induced drag increases.

options.a: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.d: I is correct, II is correct.
